title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Update: Russian ballistic missile strike hits Kyiv arms exhibition event, at least 10 dead, 100 injured. The Ukrainian Council of Defense Industry said in a post on social media that "an enemy missile strike occurred in the Kyiv region at a location where representatives of the Ukrainian defense industry were present."
description_en: Update: Russian ballistic missile strike hits Kyiv arms exhibition event, at least 10 dead, 100 injured. The Ukrainian Council of Defense Industry said in a post on social media that "an enemy missile strike occurred in the Kyiv region at a location where representatives of the Ukrainian defense industry were present."
description_uk: Update: Russian ballistic missile strike hits Kyiv arms exhibition event, at least 10 dead, 100 injured. The Ukrainian Council of Defense Industry said in a post on social media that "an enemy missile strike occurred in the Kyiv region at a location where representatives of the Ukrainian defense industry were present."

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Military factory in Russia's Kirov in flames after reported Flamingo attack, local authorities report casualties. A major factory producing missile and aviation parts in the Russian city of Kirov was damaged in a Ukrainian Flamingo cruise missile strike that left six dead and dozens more injured, Russian and Ukrainian authorities as well as local media reported on July 24.
description_en: Military factory in Russia's Kirov in flames after reported Flamingo attack, local authorities report casualties. A major factory producing missile and aviation parts in the Russian city of Kirov was damaged in a Ukrainian Flamingo cruise missile strike that left six dead and dozens more injured, Russian and Ukrainian authorities as well as local media reported on July 24.
description_uk: Military factory in Russia's Kirov in flames after reported Flamingo attack, local authorities report casualties. A major factory producing missile and aviation parts in the Russian city of Kirov was damaged in a Ukrainian Flamingo cruise missile strike that left six dead and dozens more injured, Russian and Ukrainian authorities as well as local media reported on July 24.

title: Bucha: Attack attack
description: The Kyiv OVA also confirmed the Russian attack on a private training ground in the Buchansky district. At the time of the attack, events were taking place on the territory. Emergency services are working on the spot, information about the consequences is being clarified.

title: Kyiv: Strike confirmed
description: A rescue operation is currently underway in the Kyiv region after the impact of Russian missiles. As of now, dozens of victims are known. It is also known that, unfortunately, six people died. My condolences to family and friends. Elucidation of all circumstances and the fate of people continues. All necessary services are available on site. There are victims in Sloviansk as a result of aerial bombardment. Five people were killed. My condolences to the family...
description_en: A rescue operation is currently underway in the Kyiv region after the impact of Russian missiles. As of now, dozens of victims are known. description_uk: Зараз триває рятувальна операція на Київщині після удару російських ракет. Станом на зараз відомо про десятки постраждалих. Відомо також, що, на жаль, шестеро людей загинули. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Продовжується з’ясування всіх обставин і долі людей. На місці працюють усі необхідні служби. Є постраждалі й у Слов’янську через удари авіабомбами. П’ять людей убито. Мої співчуття рідним....

title: Air defense active
description: An unknown drone once again flew into the airspace of Romania - it was shot down by an F-16. President Nikushor Dan said that the drone entered the airspace of the country around 11:00. The pilot opened fire over a deserted area, the wreckage is now being studied by experts. This is far from the first such case. In May, a Russian drone flew into a residential building in Galati, Romania, and injured two people. Total with...
description_en: An unknown drone once again flew into the airspace of Romania - it was shot down by an F-16. President Nikushor Dan said that the drone entered the airspace of the country around 11:00. The pilot opened fire over a deserted area, the wreckage is now being studied by experts. This is far from the first such case. In May, a Russian drone flew into a residential building in Galati, Romania, and injured two people. Total with...
description_uk: В воздушное пространство Румынии в очередной раз залетел неизвестный дрон - его сбил F-16 Президент Никушор Дан заявил, что беспилотник вошел в воздушное пространство страны около 11:00. Пилот открыл огонь над безлюдной территорией, обломки сейчас изучают специалисты. Это далеко не первый такой случай. В мае российский дрон долетел до жилого дома в румынском Галаце и ранил двух человек. Всего с...

title: Crimea: Drone attack
description: Update: Wildberries logistics hub in St. Petersburg struck in Ukrainian drone attack. A Wildberries logistics center in St. Petersburg was among the facilities struck by Ukrainian drones, Russian Telegram media channels reported, leading to a large fire at the facility.

title: Crimea: Drone strike
description: Wildberries logistics hubs in occupied Crimea, Russia's Tver catch fire after reported Ukrainian drone strikes. Logistics centers belonging to Russia's largest online retailer, Wildberries, came under fire in multiple regions amid reports of Ukrainian drone attacks targeting the facilities overnight on July 24.

title: Zaporizhzhia: 25 injured
description: At least 25 injured, including six children, in Russian strike on Zaporizhzhia. Russia struck the southern city of Zaporizhzhia with five guided aerial bombs on the evening of July 23, injuring at least 25 people, regional authorities said.

Those who fight, support, justify or profit from Russian aggression do not have the right...

Those who fight, support, justify or profit from Russian aggression do not have the right...
description_uk: Очільник МЗС України Андрій Сибіга привітав сьогоднішнє рішення щодо 21-го пакету санкцій ЄС проти Росії, який запроваджує додаткові обмежувальні заходи у сферах енергетики, торгівлі та фінансів. 💬 "Особливо вітаю перші кроки до запровадження офіційної заборони на в’їзд до ЄС для російських комбатантів. Ті, хто воєює, сприяє, виправдовує російську агресію або наживається на ній, не мають права...

title: Airstrike attack on residential area
description: Had a meeting with the Raytheon team led by Vice President Joseph Deantona. Raytheon is a very strong defense company, and Ukraine has long been using its technology to protect our people from brutal Russian attacks. I am grateful for the company's willingness to take our partnership to an even higher level, when Ukraine will produce together with Raytheon some of the most important air defense equipment -...
description_en: Had a meeting with the Raytheon team led by Vice President Joseph Deantona. Raytheon is a very strong defense company, and Ukraine has long been using its technology to protect our people from brutal Russian attacks. I am grateful for the company's willingness to take our partnership to an even higher level, when Ukraine will produce together with Raytheon some of the most important air defense equipment -...
description_uk: Провів зустріч із командою компанії Raytheon на чолі з віцепрезидентом Джозефом Деантоною. Raytheon – дуже сильна оборонна компанія, і Україна вже давно використовує її техніку для захисту наших людей від жорстоких російських атак. Я вдячний за готовність компанії вивести наше партнерство на ще вищий рівень, коли Україна вироблятиме спільно з Raytheon одні з найважливіших засобів ППО –...
